feature: multiple distinct vehicles per booking, per-vehicle params, summed transport
technical_review: APPROVE (after fixes — was BLOCK: 1 HIGH+2 MED+1 LOW, all resolved)
notes: New BookingVehicle child table (@@unique([bookingId,vehicleId]), Cascade) — additive, legacy Booking.vehicle* columns kept for back-compat read fallback. quoteEstimate/createBookingDraft/rebuildBookingEstimate/confirmBooking handle vehicle arrays; transportSubtotal = Decimal sum of per-vehicle computeTransportPrice totals; computeBookingTransportSubtotal prefers vehicles[] else legacy single-column fallback. Zod transportSchema = array + .refine distinct vehicleId (dup→400). Serializer exposes vehicles[] (+explicit transportSubtotalRub.toString). Frontend: TransportCard multi-select + per-vehicle param cards + total; BookingForm array state + edit hydration (vehicles[] else legacy); transportClientCalc Decimal sum mirrors server. Idempotent backfill-booking-vehicles.ts (dry-run default). PATCH transport edits intentionally NOT wired (v1) but serializes vehicles[]. Review BLOCK→resolved: HIGH dryRun POST/PATCH omitted transport from preview (fixed: pass transport, return transport/transportSubtotal/grandTotal matching real-save finalAmount, tests added); MED client float sum→Decimal parity; MED explicit transportSubtotalRub serialization; LOW stale JSDoc. Deploy needs prisma db push (additive) + backfill script run on prod.
